mapper.insert: INSERT INTO water_events (id, elder_id, device_id, started_at, ended_at, duration_seconds, average_confidence, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{elderId}, #{deviceId}, #{startedAt}, #{endedAt}, #{durationSeconds}, #{averageConfidence}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO water_events (id, elder_id, device_id, started_at, ended_at, duration_seconds, average_confidence, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.elderId}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.startedAt}, #{item.endedAt}, #{item.durationSeconds}, #{item.averageConfidence}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM water_events WHERE elder_id = #{elderId} AND started_at >= #{startTime}
